name: historical_notes
Ilerda Campaign: Compressed Ilerda campaign: Caesar faced Afranius and Petreius near the Sicoris and Cinga rivers using engineering and maneuvers to restore supplies and force surrender rather than seeking a decisive slaughter.

name: ROMAN
column4: seize crossings and high ground without wasting veterans in a frontal assault
column5: cut off the Pompeian army and compel surrender

name: POMPEIAN
column4: hold the river approaches and protect the retreat routes toward Celtiberia
column5: avoid encirclement while Caesar's supply crisis worsens
